issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The effect checks if the Leader has {Foxy Pirates} type, not if a card is on board.
Condition structure incorrect. Should use 'LeaderHasType' with type value, not 'HasCardOnBoard' with name. Correct: {"type":"LeaderHasType","value":"Foxy Pirates"}
Second effect missing cost requirement. DSL must include 'cost':1 to represent the DON!! −1 payment. Also missing 'Rest' action after GiveDon.
Second effect (Activate: Main) is incomplete. Should include both GiveDon and Rest actions. Current DSL only has GiveDon without the Rest action that follows 'add and rest it'.
